name: Chicken with Avocado Salsa
recipeIngredient: 2 Green onions with tops - thinly sliced
4 Heated corn tortillas or lettuce leaves
recipeInstructions:
Arrange chicken around the edges of a 9-inch pie plate or baking dish. Sprinkle with chili powder, salt and pepper. Cover with vented plastic wrap. Rotate dish midway through cooking, then microwave on high for 5 to 6 minutes; set aside.
Peel, seed and chop avocado. Combine with lime juice in a small bowl. Add salsa, tomato and green onions; toss gently. Slice cooked chicken into 1 to 2-inch strips and arrange on tortillas, making 4 servings. Top each serving with salsa. Microwave for 50% (medium) for 2 minutes or until heated. Makes 4 servings.
